brain.commentary: The council leans toward a balanced stance. Core equity ETFs (SPY, QQQ, DIA) and AAPL show solid long conviction, while a cluster of large caps (MSFT, NVDA, AMZN, TSLA, META) are flat with negative composites and elevated beta/volatility, suggesting fragility. Crypto assets are uniformly negative and highly volatile, warranting a defensive tilt. Overall exposure is modestly bullish but we keep risk modestly below 1.0 to preserve capital.
